name: obsidian-mcp
description: Obsidian vault cartridge -- note search, content retrieval, backlink navigation, tag browsing, graph analysis, dataview queries, frontmatter extraction, daily notes, template listing, and vault statistics via the Obsidian Local REST API

tools.name: obsidian_search_notes
tools.description: Search Obsidian vault for notes by text query across titles and content

tools.name: obsidian_get_note
tools.description: Get the full content of an Obsidian note by path (relative to vault root)

path.description: Note path relative to vault root (e.g. 'Projects/my-note.md')

tools.name: obsidian_list_notes
tools.description: List all notes in the vault or a specific folder, with optional filtering

folder.description: Folder path to list (omit for vault root)

tools.name: obsidian_get_backlinks
tools.description: Get all notes that link to a given note (backlink/incoming link analysis)

path.description: Note path to find backlinks for

tools.name: obsidian_get_outgoing_links
tools.description: Get all notes that a given note links to (outgoing link analysis)

path.description: Note path to find outgoing links for

tools.name: obsidian_list_tags
tools.description: List all tags used in the vault with note counts

tools.name: obsidian_get_notes_by_tag
tools.description: Get all notes tagged with a specific tag

tools.name: obsidian_get_frontmatter
tools.description: Get YAML frontmatter metadata for a specific note

path.description: Note path relative to vault root

tools.name: obsidian_get_daily_note
tools.description: Get the daily note for a specific date (or today if no date given)

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format (omit for today)

tools.name: obsidian_vault_stats
tools.description: Get vault statistics (total notes, folders, tags, links, word count)

tools.name: obsidian_dataview_query
tools.description: Execute a Dataview query against the vault (requires Dataview plugin)

tools.name: obsidian_list_templates
tools.description: List available note templates in the vault's template folder
